no: Diablo 2 Sorcerer kit for Sorcerer class. Fire, lightning, and cold spell trees. EE-only (BGEE, BG2EE, EET). Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

activated.effects: Fire Bolt, Inferno, Blaze, Fireball, Fire Wall, Meteor, Hydra.
Charged Bolt, Static Field, Nova, Lightning, Chain Lightning, Teleport, Energy Shield, Thunder Storm.
Ice Bolt, Frost Nova, Ice Blast, Glacial Spike, Blizzard, Frozen Orb.

restrictions.items: Replaces standard Sorcerer spell system with D2 skill point system. No dual-class.

spellRestrictions.note: D2 skill-point system replaces standard Sorcerer spell system

hlaPool.note: D2 elemental skill tree replaces sorcerer HLA pool.

statBonus.note: D2 elemental trees: Fire/Lightning/Cold, each ~9 spells.

new: Diablo 2-inspired elemental mage. Fire, lightning, and cold spell mastery.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Sorcerer kit for the Sorcerer class. Fire, lightning, and cold spell trees. EE-only.
